claim_text: Katyayani Peeth is a current temple-ashram complex in Vrindavan represented by Katyayani Trust.
Katyayani Trust presents Swami Keshavanand as linked to Lahiri Mahasaya and as consecrator of the temple in 1923.
notes: Own-lineage claim; not independent historical proof.

claim_text: The AOAY relation to the exact present Katyayani Peeth footprint is not double-verified.
notes: Direct controlled edition passage plus present-place identity not both obtained.

claim_text: A Neem Karoli Baba ashram complex exists in Vrindavan and contains the samadhi associated with Maharaj-ji.
notes: Current official-management source not reliably retrieved.

claim_text: Shri Krishna Janmasthan Seva Sansthan manages the Shri Krishna Janmabhoomi temple premises in Mathura.
notes: Current reporting and court-related reporting agree; advocacy trusts excluded.

claim_text: Shri Krishna Janmasthan is an active public worship and festival site.
notes: Current worship is supported; exact July 2026 access rules are not.

claim_text: Radha Kund is a distinct named sacred water body adjoining Shyam Kund.
Shyam Kund is a distinct named sacred water body adjoining Radha Kund.
Govardhan Hill is a physical landscape object distinct from the Govardhan Parikrama route.
Govardhan Parikrama is a physically traceable living circumambulation practice.
notes: Official Braj body recognizes parikrama pilgrimage.

claim_text: Kusum Sarovar is a current named heritage object in Govardhan.
Fysieke plek bevestigd; actuele bezoekbaarheid niet betrouwbaar vastgesteld.
notes: Applied per candidate where exact current access was not independently verified.
